title: Your Data Join Is Half Empty Because of Typos. Here's How to Fix It.
summary: The same value spelled twenty different ways is one of the most common blockers in real-world data work. This post covers fuzzy matching for typos and abbreviations, sentence embeddings for true synonyms, and how to combine them into a two-pass pipeline — evaluated against ground truth with F1 scores above 0.95.

title: Logistic Regression in Python: A Step-by-Step Guide
summary: Predict machine failure before it happens — a complete logistic regression walkthrough in Python.

title: Beyond Linear PCA: Kernel PCA, t-SNE, and UMAP
summary: PCA finds linear structure. Real data often isn't linear. This post derives Kernel PCA, t-SNE, and UMAP from first principles and applies all three to the same breast cancer dataset used in last week's PCA walkthrough.

title: Principal Component Analysis: Find the Needle in Your Feature Haystack
summary: Most datasets have far fewer meaningful dimensions than features. PCA finds them. With a real cancer dataset, learn how PCA can compress 30 noisy features into 6 with minimal loss in classifier accuracy.

title: DBSCAN Clustering: A Practical Guide (and How to Switch from K-Means)
summary: How DBSCAN finds arbitrarily shaped clusters and handles outliers automatically, and how to swap it into code that used K-Means.

title: PyQt for Data Professionals: Wrap Your Scripts in a Real Desktop App
summary: You already know Python. PyQt lets you turn your existing data scripts into desktop apps that non-technical teammates can actually use — no web server required.

title: A Practical Guide to K-Means Clustering
summary: A primer on the K-Means clustering method, and how to draw the right conclusions with it.

title: Comparing Pattern Discovery Algorithms -- Apriori vs FPGrowth
summary: Which algorithm should you use for your application?
